description_long: This is a modern office building with a mix of black and brown brick facades, featuring large industrial-style arched and rectangular windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. The structure has three main stories, with the top floor set back to create spacious rooftop terraces adorned with pergolas, planters, and outdoor seating areas. The ground level includes multiple glass doors and large windows, suggesting retail or lobby spaces, while the upper floors are more private and likely used for offices. The rooftop is divided into several functional zones, including shaded seating, open-air gathering spaces, and utility enclosures. The building is bordered by a paved sidewalk and is accompanied by parked cars, indicating its urban context. The overall design blends contemporary and industrial elements, with clean lines, metal railings, and a combination of solid and open fencing on the terraces.
description: A modern, multi-story office building with large arched and rectangular windows, brick and black facades, and spacious rooftop terraces with pergolas and outdoor seating.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black facade with prominent arched windows, glass doors at street level, and a rooftop terrace with pergola and planters.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brown brick exterior, regular rectangular windows, and the setback rooftop terraces with metal railings and outdoor furniture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying more arched windows, a large garage-style door, and the rooftop divided into multiple functional outdoor spaces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the black facade, rooftop terrace with pergola, and a car parked along the sidewalk.
attribute_window_pattern: Regularly spaced large arched and rectangular windows in a grid pattern, with repetition across each floor and symmetrical arrangement on the main facades.
